title: Batch Sunday: Big 10 (Soul-Food Forward)
description: A 10-dish batch set for Sunday cook-ups: freezable mains, mix-and-match sides, and flavor bases to power weeknights. Soul-Food forward with Caribbean, West African, Cajun, Creole, BBQ, Herb-Garlic, Citrus-Chili notes.

meta.curation_notes: Focus on big yield + low friction: sheet pans, pressure cooker, braise. Include bases (sofrito, pepper mash) to accelerate weeknight cooking.
meta.serving_plan: Cook on Sunday; cool fast; portion; freeze. Stage 2-3 fresh accents midweek (slaw, greens, herbs).
meta.storage_policy: 2-4 days fridge (≤40°F / 4°C); 2-3 months freezer in air-tight, labeled portions.
meta.labels_template: YYYY-MM-DD | dish | portion size | reheating notes

items.title: Caribbean Jerk Chicken (Bulk Tray)
items.description: Family-size tray of jerk-marinated chicken with peppers and onion—perfect for bowls, tacos, or salads.
ingredients: 1/2 cup jerk marinade or spice + oil
steps: Heat oven to 425°F / 220°C; line two sheet pans.
Toss chicken & veg with marinade, lime, salt. Spread in single layers.
Roast 30–35 min until caramelized; rest 10 min; slice. Portion and chill quickly.

items.title: West African Peanut Stew (Batch Base)
items.description: Creamy peanut-tomato base with greens; add chicken or beans across the week.

meta.reheat: Simmer 5–8 min; thin with broth if needed

steps: Sauté onion & garlic in oil 5 min. Add tomato paste; cook 1 min.
Whisk in peanut butter & broth; simmer 15–20 min.
Add greens; simmer 5 min. Season. Cool, portion, label.

items.title: Creole Red Beans (Big Skillet Batch, No Pork)
items.description: Smoky-spiced red beans for rice bowls, wraps, or breakfast bowls.
steps: Sauté onion, celery, bell pepper 6–8 min. Add garlic 30 sec.
Add paprika & Creole seasoning; toast 30 sec.
Add beans & broth; simmer 15–20 min to thicken. Season to taste. Cool, portion.

items.title: BBQ Pulled Beef (Pressure Cooker, No Pork)
items.description: Shreddable beef with tangy BBQ sauce; ideal for sandwiches, bowls, and baked potatoes.

meta.reheat: Sauce + simmer 10 min or oven 300°F covered 20 min

ingredients: 4 lb beef chuck roast, large chunks
steps: Season beef with salt/pepper. Add all to pressure cooker.
Cook High Pressure 60 min; natural release 15 min.
Shred; add extra BBQ sauce if needed. Portion with juices.

items.title: Cajun Shrimp & Rice (Bulk Skillet)
items.description: Spicy shrimp folded into seasoned rice—pack into 2-cup freezer portions.

meta.reheat: Covered microwave or skillet with splash of water

steps: Toss shrimp with Cajun seasoning; sear in oil 2–3 min total; remove.
Stir-fry pepper 2 min; add rice; toss to heat through.
Fold in shrimp & green onion; season. Cool & portion.

items.title: Herb-Garlic Chicken Thighs (Roaster Pan)
items.description: Juicy herb chicken for salads, wraps, pastas, or grain bowls.
steps: Heat oven to 400°F / 205°C. Season chicken with herbs, garlic, salt, pepper.
Arrange in roaster; add broth. Roast 35–40 min to 175°F.
Rest, slice, and portion with juices.

items.title: Citrus-Chili Roasted Veg (Mix-In Base)
items.description: Zesty tray of mixed veg to fold into bowls, tacos, or omelets.
ingredients: 2 lb mixed veg (cauliflower, broccoli, carrots, peppers)
Zest + juice of 2 limes or oranges
steps: Heat oven to 425°F / 220°C. Toss veg with oil, citrus, chili, salt.
Roast on two trays 20–25 min, tossing once. Cool & portion.

items.title: Pressure Cooker Collards with Smoked Turkey
items.description: Tender greens with smoky depth—reheat friendly for the week.
steps: Add all to pressure cooker; cook High 20 min; natural release 10 min.
Adjust seasoning with vinegar, salt, pepper. Portion with pot liquor.

items.title: Coconut Rice (Rice Cooker Batch)
items.description: Lightly sweet, aromatic rice to pair with Caribbean & West African mains.

meta.reheat: Microwave with splash of water, covered

steps: Add all to rice cooker; cook per appliance instructions.
Fluff; spread to cool; portion.

items.title: Skillet Cornbread (Muffin Portions, Freezer-Ready)
items.description: Moist cornbread baked as muffins for easy thaw & toast.
steps: Heat oven to 400°F / 205°C; grease muffin trays.
Whisk dry; whisk wet; combine; rest 5 min.
Fill cups; bake 12–15 min until golden. Cool & freeze.

items.title: Green Sofrito Base (1 Quart)
items.description: Herb-garlic pepper base—freeze in cubes to jump-start pans, beans, and rice.

meta.reheat: Use from frozen; 1–2 cubes per pan

steps: Blend all smooth. Portion into ice cube trays.
Freeze; pop into bags; label.

items.title: Pepper Mash Ferment (Quick Start Jar)
items.description: Small chili mash to fuel sauces all month.
steps: Mash chilies with salt; pack in clean jar; weight & cover loosely.
Burp daily; ferment 5–7 days; refrigerate.

items.title: Turkey “Bacon” Bits (No Pork, Batch)
items.description: Smoky, crisp bits for beans, greens, salads, and grits.
ingredients: 2 lb turkey slices or ground turkey
2 tsp soy sauce or coconut aminos
steps: Cook turkey in oil until browned & crisp.
Season with smoked paprika, garlic, and soy/aminos; cook 1–2 min to coat. Drain & cool on rack; portion.
